title: Week of March 30, 2026
summary: This week focused on platform stability improvements that ensure your OpsPal workspace runs smoothly. We enhanced Salesforce deployment reliability with better error recovery and improved data validation to catch potential issues before they impact your workflows. Additionally, we expanded our skill catalog to 683 available automation skills across 25 categories, giving you more options for customizing your RevOps processes.

entries.headline: Expanded skill catalog now includes 683 automation skills across 25 categories
Enhanced data import reliability and process documentation
Salesforce deployments now recover automatically from errors
Plugin names now display consistently throughout the platform
Historical activity data for weeks 12 and 13 now displays correctly
Platform updates now include latest marketplace features
Better Salesforce validation catches state and country field configuration issues
details: Automatically detects when state and country fields might cause deployment problems
Validates field references before making changes to prevent errors

entries.headline: Complex Salesforce deployments now run more reliably
HubSpot automations now launch without errors
